"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audited each major claim against the evidence, identifying unsupported statements and missing evidence.",

  "R1.7": "Flagged missing citations and incorrect attributions, showing good engagement.",
  "RX.1": "Highlighted uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "Output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "Avoided introducing errors and pointed out potential harms.",
  "RX.5": "Identified data provenance issues but didn't trace all changes."
},

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each major claim against the evidence, identifying unsupported statements and missing evidence.
rationale.R1.4: Identified some deltas but did not map against multiple prior works comprehensively.
rationale.R1.7: Flagged missing citations and incorrect attributions, showing good engagement.
rationale.RX.1: Highlighted uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Avoided introducing errors and pointed out potential harms.
rationale.RX.5: Identified data provenance issues but didn't trace all changes.
